_comment: Visa/status definitions (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.20 V1/V2/V4). Runtime state machine lives in game/visas.ts (VisaMachine) — this file is definitions only, hot-reloaded like every other data/*.json (defs may change live; runtime VisaMachine state is preserved, see VisaMachine.retune). `durationDays: null` = permanent (never expires). `losable` + `graceDays` = on expiry the sim gets a grace window before game over instead of an immediate one (job-loss style statuses). `obtainedVia` describes how a NON-start status is granted: 'quest' via grantVisa, 'application' via the phone; the start status (tuning.visa.startStatus) has neither, so the field is optional. Application `requirements` use the quest condition namespace. Edit these definitions in tools/career.html.
